message:
test(doom): add 20 unit tests for map module

LineDef flag checks (two_sided, blocking, combined), front/back sector
resolution, Sector sky ceiling detection, parse_child edge cases,
point_in_subsector with empty nodes, player_start found/not-found,
struct field verification for Vertex/Thing/Seg/SubSector.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
